body:
Hey Felix, thanks for the note — always good to hear from you. I've been keeping a close eye on [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) since we spoke last quarter, and I think the timing is starting to make more sense for us now that their pilot results are in. We're still calibrating our position size at the seed end given some portfolio concentration on the climate infra side, but I'd be open to a co-investment conversation if Accel is moving toward a term sheet. Let me know what your timeline looks like and whether a call later this week works — I'm generally free Thursday afternoon onward.

Amara
